title: How Free Wi-Fi Actually Works — and When It's Putting Your Data at Risk
excerpt: The Wi-Fi at your coffee shop, airport, and hotel isn't free — you pay with your data, your attention, or your security. Here's exactly what happens when you connect, which risks are real versus overhyped, and how to protect yourself without giving anything up.

title: Why Your Phone Bill Is Higher Than Your Plan Price — Every Fee and Surcharge Explained
excerpt: Your carrier advertises $45/month. Your bill says $67. The gap isn't an accident — it's a deliberate mix of government taxes, regulatory fees, and carrier-invented surcharges. Here's exactly what each one is and which ones you can do something about.

title: Why Your Streaming Services Keep Getting More Expensive
excerpt: Streaming prices have risen dramatically since the early days of cord-cutting. Here's the economics behind every price increase, what you're actually paying for, and how to audit your subscriptions.

title: How Gig Platforms Classify Workers as Contractors - and What That Actually Costs You
excerpt: The difference between employee and independent contractor status isn't just a label. Here's exactly what gig platforms gain, what you lose, and the real math behind working for yourself.

title: How Digital Banks and Fintech Apps Actually Make Money
excerpt: If the app is free, you're not the customer — you're the product. Here's exactly how neobanks and fintech platforms generate revenue, and what that means for your account.

title: How to Pick an Internet Plan Without Getting Ripped Off
excerpt: A no-nonsense guide to understanding internet speeds, contract traps, ISP jargon, and exactly how to choose the right plan without paying for things you don't need.

title: How to Switch Cell Phone Carriers for Dummies
excerpt: Switching phone carriers can save you $600+ a year. Here's exactly how to do it without losing your number, bricking your phone, or getting hit with hidden fees.

title: Prepaid vs. Postpaid Cell Phone Plans: Which One Makes Sense For You
excerpt: Prepaid plans have quietly gotten very good. Here's an honest comparison of prepaid vs. postpaid — who each is actually right for, and how to stop overpaying for the same network.

title: High-Yield Savings Accounts: How to Find the Best Rate Right Now
excerpt: HYSAs are paying 10x more than traditional banks right now. Here's how they work, what to watch out for, and exactly how to find the best rate available today.

title: The Gig Apps Actually Worth Your Time in 2025
excerpt: Not every gig platform is created equal. Some have better pay structures, more reliable demand, and realistic requirements. Here's an honest breakdown of the major platforms — what they actually involve, and who each one is right for.

title: How to Lower Your Monthly Bills Without Canceling a Single Service
excerpt: Most people are overpaying for internet, phone, and subscriptions without realizing it. This guide walks you through every negotiation tactic, loyalty discount, and free switch that can cut hundreds from your monthly bills — no cancellations required.
